story: After their third anniversary, distance grew. To save the marriage, Miranda agreed to a weeklong separation. Adam stayed with a friend; there were no calls, only a few texts. During that week, Adam kept meeting the other woman after work and intended to keep seeing her even if he returned. The days crawled by. Then the call came: “I have decided it is time to come back home,” Adam said.
implausible_knowledge: During that week, Adam kept meeting the other woman after work and intended to keep seeing her even if he returned.
question: When Adam calls to say he wants to come back home, what will Miranda most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Refuse to let him return and keep the separation or end the marriage.
answer_without_knowledge: Say yes and let him move back home.
